creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks, committed!  By the way, a couple of comments: 

(1) Don't touch the $Id$ line as well as "Whom" and "Date created" 
when you are submitting an upgrade. 

(2) Please check the patch for things like "No newline at end of 
file". ;)
